title: anthemis cretica subsp. cassia
intro: Anthemis cretica subsp. cassia, also known as Cassina or Cassia Anthemis, is a subspecies of Anthemis cretica, a perennial herb in the daisy family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and soothe digestive issues. The health benefits of Anthemis cretica subsp. cassia include relieving symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and menstrual cramps, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antiseptic properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
